Home.heroDescription: A small-batch craft hot sauce brand from Serbia. From mellow smoke to brutal punches, Smokin' Hot brings you honest craft production, a dirty character, and a web shop that sells without getting in the way.
Home.trustStrip: Handcrafted · Fast delivery · Cash on delivery · Natural ingredients
Home.heatScaleDescription: Instead of a generic shop, Smokin' Hot walks you through a clear path: mild, hot, extra hot, and full-on attack.
Home.testimonialTitle: Homemade sauce. Dirty character. Clean taste.
Home.testimonialBody: Smokin' Hot isn't just another generic food shop. The brand should feel like a mash-up of a garage band, a small craft workshop, and serious love for chili. Visually loud, but the UX stays clean, clear, and built to convert.
Home.perk1Text: Order online, pay when the parcel lands at your door. No drama, no card waiting games.
Home.perk2Text: Hand-picked peppers, small batches, a relentless focus on flavor, smoke, and character.
Home.perk3Text: The heat scale walks you from tame smoke to a full-on palate attack.
Home.pairingDescription: Every sauce is designed to take a specific dish to a whole new flavor level.
Home.tourDescription: Follow our tour across Serbia — where we've scorched palates and where we're going next!
Home.tourFallbackDescription: Come and try our latest sauces in person!
Home.tourStatsSubtitle: Our path across Serbia so far

OAbout.title: From a garage in Barajevo to Serbian tables
OAbout.storyIntro: Smokin' Hot Collective is a small craft workshop making hot sauces in small batches. Our pepper, our smoke, our fire.
OAbout.storyP1: It started in 2018 in a garage — one electric pan, three kinds of pepper, and too many sleepless nights. The first sauce was a disaster. The second was already stealing tapas off friends' plates.
OAbout.storyP2: Five years later we make six sauces, we're testing a seventh, and we're taking the tour across Serbian barbecues to prove that homegrown hot sauce can stand next to the best in the world.
OAbout.principle1Text: We work with growers from Vojvodina and southern Serbia. If it's not ours, it doesn't go into the bottle.
OAbout.principle2Text: Never more than 200 bottles per cycle. Quality over quantity.
OAbout.principle3Text: No preservatives, no artificial flavor enhancers. Smoke, pepper, salt, vinegar. End of story.
